title: Yizhet Led Balloon Lights, 30 Pcs Mini Led Lantern Lights, Cool White, No-Flashing, IP65 Waterproof, Battery Operated for Paper Lantern Indoor Outdoor, Halloween, Christmas, Wedding, Party, Birthday
features: 【✨30 Pcs Mini LED Lights】Cool white led balloon lights, with Bright Led, power saving, stronger and durable, can light up paper lanterns or balloons, for creating a cozy atmosphere (Lighting mode: No flashing)

【✨Easy to Decorate】Each light for paper lanterns with a hook at top, you can thread them easily to fit paper lanterns, balloons or string lights. Also put in floral arrangements, garlands, bouquets, bridal sets, centerpieces, bottles, vases, glas for DIY decoration.

【✨Easy to Operate】Turn each single LED Light on and off by twisting the base. Turn on: just open the cap, remove the insulation sheet, and then tighten the cap. Turn off: please twist the cap out and insert the insulating sheet into the cap , then twist on the cap.

【✨Wide Applications】These lantern balloon lights are waterproof, additional with waterproof silicone sleeve to prevent rain. Perfect for indoor and outdoor use to create an surprice atmosphere for dinner, parties, weddings, birthdays, Christmas and Halloween.
【✨Steady Lighting】Each LED balloon light is individual wireless, powered by 3 x 1.5 V LR41, the lighting time is 2-16 hours, within 2 hours is optimal brightness.
description: Product Description LED Balloon Lights Cool White 30 pieces LED Balloon lights can light up paper lanterns or balloons and emit beautiful light, can be used for weddings, birthdays, parties, concerts, carnivals, anniversary celebration lights, Halloween, Christmas, Thanksgiving, etc. Wide Application: Led for Balloons Ideal for any celebrations, party, concert, wedding, birthday, carnival, Christmas, Halloween, etc. Lights for Lantern Hanging these lights in decorative paper lanterns for a gorgeous effect. The cool, low voltage LEDs are safe around paper. Lamps for Wedding LED balloon lights are used in various decoration of parties, weddings, birthdays, anniversaries, Christmas, Halloween and so on. Lamps for DIY Illuminating paper lanterns, flower arrangements, garlands, bouquets, bridal jewelry, table decorations, place cards, candles, vases, balloons. Details: Light color: cool white Material: Silver-plated ABS and chrome, with silicone sleeve. Light Mode: steady light, not flashing Specifications: Weight: 1.4g / Piece Battery: Powered by 3 Pcs LR41 (included and replaceable) Working time: each lasts 1-48 hours; within 2 hours is optimal brightness Waterproof: submersible and waterproof. How to operate the LED balloon lights? Please twist off the cap of the balloon light. Please pull off the insulating tab. Twist the cap back again until you see the lamp glow. If you want to turn off the light, slide the insulating strip back, the light will be off. Why does the lamp not work? If some lights don't glow brightly by simply rotating the cap, it may not be a quality issue. Twist the cap and elastic band with greater strength. If the lights still don't work, disassemble and install them, then try twisting them!
